allowed_files_raw: Source-truth control-plane files only while awaiting the next authorized seam.
forbidden_files_raw: No product code, runtime, auth, schema, Slack, Stripe, or UI changes.
acceptance_condition: The repo names no closed issue as active and waits for an explicitly authorized successor seam.
stop_condition: Stop when source truth no longer points at a closed issue as active and GitHub receipts record the repair.
next_command: Create or name the next authorized issue before any implementation work begins.
